errors.globalErrorDefault: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

notFound.label: 404 Error
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, may have been moved, or the URL might be incorrect.

hero.title: Top Blockchain Companies
hero.description: A polished directory interface for comparing blockchain development partners by service focus, region, project budget, profile strength, and hourly rate. A featured partner is highlighted first.

list.title: Blockchain company comparison
list.description: Filter the company list by service, region, budget, and profile strength. The list is rendered from the API data layer so the page behaves like a real directory surface.
list.empty: No companies match the selected filters.

methodology.title: Comparison model
methodology.description: The page is structured for buyers who need to scan blockchain partners quickly and move from comparison to contact intent.

profile.title: Profile-first
profile.description: Cards surface rate, budget, location, team size, and service focus before long copy.

fit.title: Buyer filters
fit.description: Search and selects map to URL query params and API-level filtering.

conversion.title: Clear next step
conversion.description: Each card keeps a single action focused on shortlist intent.
